title: To Mrs. Julia Ward Howe
content:
Dear Lady of Tranquillity, Ah! lightly have the years
        Their music on thy heart-strings played, and all the smiles and tears
        That mark the joy of living, that sound the depths of pain
        For thee make one great harmony - a happy heart's refrain.


            (On her eighty-sixth birthday.)
meaning:
This evocative piece by Helen Leah Reed, titled "To Mrs. Julia Ward Howe", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
